case_title: JOHN WILLIAMS VS. FELIPE PUAC et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $70.00 SERVED SEP-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT FELIPE PUAC WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA PUAC WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 506.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE PUAC, SANDRA $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $469.58 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,589.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-223 - DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT (FOR SC-222 ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ISSUED:11-12-2013) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, SANDRA
SC-223 - DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT (FOR SC-222 ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ISSUED:11-12-2013) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,469.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE PUAC, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS; FILED BY DEFENDANT PUAC, FELIPE PUAC, SANDRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-222). THE REQUEST IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING: PAYMENTS OF 1,117.25 ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING NOV-15-2013, UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL.
